entry.title: New: CR 25-59 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FIRST READING of Bill 78, CD1 (2025) to grant a Change in Zoning from Agricultural District to R-2 Residential District for 0.7099 acres at 1550 Nukuna Place, Wailuku, Hawai‘i, identified for Real Property Tax purposes as Tax Map Key (2) 3-6-007:010.

Housing and Land Use Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
